changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template for Invitation To Regulator
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template (id, name, subject, text) VALUES (nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InvitationToRegulatorAccount', 'Confirm your account - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'An account has been created for you in the CCA reporting service.
[Confirm your account](${regulatorInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in 72 hours.
You will be asked to create a password and set up two-factor authentication.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.');

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InviteeInvitationAccepted', 'Your account has been accepted - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'You have successfully accepted your account on the CCA reporting service.
You can now [sign in to your account](${homeUrl}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InviterInvitationAccepted', 'User account activation', 'Dear ${userFirstName} ${userLastName},
This is to notify you that ${userInviteeFirstName} ${userInviteeLastName} has accepted the invitation.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'UserAccountActivation', 'Your account has been activated - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'Your ${userRoleType} account has been activated in the CCA reporting service.
You can now [sign in to your account](${homeUrl}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: pafilisa@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE notification_template SET text = 'An account has been created for you in the CCA reporting service.
[Confirm your account](${regulatorInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in 72 hours.
You will be asked to create a password and set up two-factor authentication.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' WHERE name = 'InvitationToRegulatorAccount';

changeSet.author: konstantinos.kavvalakis@trasys.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'Change2FA', 'Two factor authentication device update request - Manage your CCA reporting', 'Use this link to sign in to the CCA service and update your authenticator app:
[Sign in and set up new two factor authentication](${change2FALink})
This link will expire in ${expirationMinutes} minutes.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: konstantinos.kavvalakis@trasys.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'Reset2FaConfirmation', 'Two-factor authentication reset - Manage your CCA reporting', 'We received your request to reset your two-factor authentication for the CCA service.
Sign in to the [CCA service](${homeUrl}) to set up a new authenticator and access your account.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: P70311

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(1) from notification_template where name='InvitationToSectorUser';

changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template for Invitation To Sector User
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InvitationToSectorUser', 'Confirm your account - Manage your CCA service', 'You have been added as a/an ${userRoleType} for ${sectorAssociationName} in the Manage your CCA service.
[Confirm your account](${sectorUserInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in ${expirationMinutes/60} hours.
If you are a new user, you will be asked to create a sign in before you can confirm your account.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the UK CCA Helpdesk](mailto:${ccaHelpdesk}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: loukerip@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: UPDATE notification_template SET text = replace(text, '(mailto:${ccaHelpdesk})', '(${contactRegulator})');

changeSet.author: P70311

preConditions.sqlCheck: select count(1) from notification_template where name='InvitationToOperatorAccount';

changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template for Invitation To Sector User
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'InvitationToOperatorAccount', 'Confirm your account - Manage your CCA Reporting', 'You have been added as a/an ${userRoleType} for ${accountName} in the CCA reporting service.
[Confirm your account](${operatorInvitationConfirmationLink})
This link will expire in ${expirationMinutes/60} hours.
If you are a new user, you will be asked to create a sign in before you can confirm your account.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the UK CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template Table for Email Assigned Task Notification
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text ) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'EmailAssignedTask', 'New task received - Manage your CCA reporting', 'You have been assigned a new task. [Sign in to your account](${homeUrl}) to view this task.
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address. ');

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, competent_authority, is_managed, last_updated_date, text ) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'GenericEmailTemplate', 'An important letter from the CCA service', 'ENGLAND', true, '2024-07-23 00:00:00', 'Dear ${responsibleUser} and ${administrativeUser},
Please find attached a communication from the Environment Agency about your Climate Change Agreement (${targetUnit}).
If you have any queries, please [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${helpdesk}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.') ;

rollback.sql: delete from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate' and competent_authority = 'ENGLAND';

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_ADMINISTRATIVE_SUBMITTED', 'Termination notice', 'ENGLAND', 'Admin Termination', '2024-07-23 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AIT_L001_Administrative_Termination.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_REGULATORY_SUBMITTED', 'Notice of intent to terminate agreement', 'ENGLAND', 'Admin Termination', '2024-07-23 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AIT_L002_Regulatory_Termination_Right_Of_Appeal.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE notification_template SET text= 'Dear ${responsibleUser} and ${administrativeUser},
Please find attached a communication from the Environment Agency about your Climate Change Agreement (${targetUnit}).
If you have any queries, please [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' WHERE NAME = 'GenericEmailTemplate';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, competent_authority, text ) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'Generic Expiration Reminder Template', '${workflow} ${workflowTask} (${expirationTime} remaining)', 'ENGLAND', 'Dear ${workflowUser}
${accountName}:
${accountBusinessId}:
The deadline for the ${workflowTask} of the ${workflow} application (reference ${workflowId}) for target unit account is due ${expirationTimeLong}. The task must be completed by ${deadline?date?string(''dd MMMM yyyy'')}.
Please contact your team leader if you are not able to complete the task before this date.
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.') ;

rollback.sql: delete from notification_template where name = 'Generic Expiration Reminder Template' and competent_authority = 'ENGLAND';

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_REGULATORY_TERMINATED', 'Admin Termination Regulatory reason notice', 'ENGLAND', 'Admin Termination', '2024-07-23 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AIT_L003_Regulatory_Termination.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_REGULATORY_WITHDRAWN', 'Withdrawal of intent to terminate agreement', 'ENGLAND', 'Admin Termination', '2024-07-23 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'Withdrawal of termination letter.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, text) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'ResetPasswordRequest', 'Password reset request - CCA Reporting service', 'We received a request to reset your password for the CCA reporting service. Use this link to reset your password:
[Reset your password](${resetPasswordLink})
This link will expire in 20 minutes.
If you did not request this reset you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' );

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REJECTED', 'Underlying agreement rejection notice', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement', '2024-08-27 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AA_L001_Underlying_Agreement_Application_Refusal.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_ACCEPTED', 'Underlying agreement proposed', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement', '2024-09-14 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AA_L002_Proposed_Underlying_Agreement.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT', 'Underlying agreement notice', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement', '2024-09-14 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'Updated UnA template - v03.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_ACTIVATED', 'Underlying agreement activated', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement', '2024-09-25 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'AA_L003_Underlying_Agreement_Activated.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACCEPTED', 'Variation of Underlying agreement proposed cover letter', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement Variation', '2024-10-02 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'CR_L002_Variation_Approved.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: P70628
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REJECTED', 'Variation of Underlying agreement rejection notice', 'ENGLAND', 'Underlying Agreement Variation', '2024-08-27 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'CR_L001_Variation_Refused.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Insert record in notification_template Table for User Feedback email

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'REPORTING_SPREADSHEETS_DOWNLOAD_TP6_V6', 'Generate download performance data', 'ENGLAND', 'Download performance data', '2024-09-25 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'Consolidated target reporting template (blank).xlsx' order by id desc limit 1));

changeSet.author: P70383
loukerip@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Update Consolidated target reporting template (blank).xlsx to the locked version

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE notification_template SET text= 'Dear ${responsibleUser},
Please find attached a communication from the Environment Agency about your Climate Change Agreement (${targetUnit}).
If you have any queries, please [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' WHERE NAME = 'GenericEmailTemplate';

rollback.sql:
UPDATE notification_template SET text= 'Dear ${responsibleUser} and ${administrativeUser},
Please find attached a communication from the Environment Agency about your Climate Change Agreement (${targetUnit}).
If you have any queries, please [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.' WHERE NAME = 'GenericEmailTemplate';

changeSet.author: vourdoukasd@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Update Consolidated target reporting template (blank).xlsx to the locked version

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO notification_template ( id, name, subject, competent_authority, is_managed, last_updated_date, text ) VALUES ( nextval('notification_template_seq'), 'GenericSectorEmailTemplate', 'An important letter from the CCA service', 'ENGLAND', true, '2025-01-31 00:00:00', 'Dear ${sectorContact},
Please find attached a communication from the Environment Agency about your Climate Change Agreement (${sectorAssociationAcronym} ${sectorAssociationName}).
If you have any queries, please [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
If you think you should not have received this email, you must [contact the CCA Helpdesk](${contactRegulator}).
This is an automatic email - please do not reply to this address.') ;

rollback.sql: delete from notification_template where name = 'GenericSectorEmailTemplate' and competent_authority = 'ENGLAND';

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'SECTOR_MOA', 'Subsistence charges Sector MoA', 'ENGLAND', 'Sector MoA', '2025-02-13 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'SC_L002_Sector_MoA.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericSectorEmailTemplate'));

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: insert into document_template ( id, type, name, competent_authority, workflow, last_updated_date, file_document_template_id, notification_template_id) values ( nextval('document_template_seq'), 'TARGET_UNIT_MOA', 'Subsistence charges Target Unit MoA', 'ENGLAND', 'Target Unit MoA', '2025-02-13 00:00:00', (select id from file_document_template where file_name = 'SC_L001_Target_Unit_MoA.docx' order by id desc limit 1), (select id from notification_template where name = 'GenericSectorEmailTemplate'));
